key_drivers: Iran conflict driving geopolitical risk premium in oil and gold; VIX elevated at 24.54
BoJ hawkish pivot (signaling rate hike) + narrowing JPY-USD differential = strong JPY (6J) bid
Tech/semis momentum (SOX +2.82%, MOVE -6.10%) driving NQ outperformance
USD weakness (DXY 99.55, -0.30%) broadly supportive of commodities and non-USD assets
Credit spread widening (HY OAS 3.28%) and yield curve flattening weigh on small caps (RTY)

fallbacks_used: News search for gold ETF flows
